intel.title: [CISA KEV] Ubiquiti UniFi OS - Ubiquiti UniFi OS Path Traversal Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-34909
廠商: Ubiquiti
產品: UniFi OS
漏洞名稱: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Path Traversal Vulnerability
說明: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to access files on the underlying system that could be manipulated to access an underlying account.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-26
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS 存在路徑遍歷漏洞（CVE-2026-34909），已被 CISA 列入已知利用漏洞清單（KEV）。具備網路存取權限的攻擊者可藉此漏洞讀取底層系統檔案，進而操縱帳戶取得控制權。由於公司內部正使用多台 UniFi AP 及 UDM-SE 控制器主機，面臨直接的安全威脅。
analysis.recommendation:
1. 立即盤點並檢查公司內部運行的 UniFi 設備（特別是 UDM-SE 主機與 AP 控制器），確認其 UniFi OS 系統版本。
2. 參考 Ubiquiti 官方安全公告（Security Advisory Bulletin 064），立即將 UniFi OS 升級至官方發布的修補版本。
3. 在完成升級前，應嚴格限制對 UniFi 管理介面的網路存取權限，避免其暴露於未受信任的網路環境中。
affected_assets: 資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 7 Pro
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 7 Pro MAX
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 6 Pro (含POE供應器)
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi AC-Lite

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Ubiquiti UniFi OS - Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-34908
廠商: Ubiquiti
產品: UniFi OS
漏洞名稱: Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
說明: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains an improper access control vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to make unauthorized changes to the system.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-26
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS 存在不當存取控制漏洞（CVE-2026-34908），已被 CISA 列入 KEV 證實存在活躍攻擊。攻擊者可藉此漏洞在網路中對 UniFi 系統進行未授權的變更。由於公司內部使用多台 UniFi AP 及其 UDM-SE 控制器主機，面臨極高被入侵與網路接管風險，需立即處置。
analysis.recommendation:
1. 立即盤點並針對公司內運作 UniFi OS 的設備（特別是 UDM-SE 控制器主機）進行韌體與軟體更新，升級至 Ubiquiti 官方發布的最新安全版本。
2. 在完成更新前，應嚴格限制對 UniFi OS 管理介面的網路存取權限，避免其暴露於未信任的網路環境中。
3. 檢查相關設備的系統日誌，確認是否有異常的未授權變更或存取紀錄。
affected_assets: 資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 7 Pro
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 7 Pro MAX
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi 6 Pro (含POE供應器)
資訊設備-無線AP UniFi AC-Lite

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Splunk Enterprise - Splunk Enterprise Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-20253
廠商: Splunk
產品: Enterprise
漏洞名稱: Splunk Enterprise Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
說明: Splunk Enterprise contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability which could allow an unauthenticated user to create or truncate arbitrary files through a PostgreSQL sidecar service endpoint.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-21
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: CISA KEV 新增 Splunk Enterprise 的安全漏洞（CVE-2026-20253），該漏洞源於 PostgreSQL sidecar 服務端點缺乏身分驗證。未授權的攻擊者可藉此在系統上建立或截斷任意檔案，造成嚴重的安全威脅。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor  - Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor Improper Access Control Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-48907
廠商: Widget Factory
產品: Joomla Content Editor 
漏洞名稱: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor Improper Access Control Vulnerability
說明: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor contains an improper access control vulnerability which could allow for upload and execution of PHP code via the creation of new editor profiles for unauthenticated users. 
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-19
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor 存在不當存取控制漏洞（CVE-2026-48907），允許未授權攻擊者建立編輯器設定檔並上傳執行 PHP 程式碼。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入 KEV 確信有在野攻擊，但與本公司技術棧無關。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin - LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-54420
廠商: LiteSpeed
產品: cPanel Plugin
漏洞名稱: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following Vulnerability
說明: LiteSpeed cPanel plugin contains a UNIX symbolic link (Symlink) following vulnerability that could allow a user with FTP or web shell access on a shared hosting server running CloudLinux/CageFS.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-18
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 此情資指出 LiteSpeed cPanel 插件存在 UNIX 符號連結（Symlink）追隨漏洞（CVE-2026-54420），允許具備 FTP 或 Web Shell 權限的攻擊者在共享主機環境中進行越權訪問。雖然此漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV 且有潛在在野利用，但本公司並未採用 LiteSpeed 或 cPanel 相關系統。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager - Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Directory or Path Traversal Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:

說明: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a directory or path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to create a file or overwrite any file on the filesystem of an affected system.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.

已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager 存在目錄或路徑遍歷漏洞（CVE-2026-20262），已被列入 CISA KEV 漏洞名單。已通過身分驗證的遠端攻擊者可利用此漏洞在受影響系統上建立或覆寫任意檔案。由於公司資產清冊中並無此產品，此威脅對公司無直接影響。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. intel.title: [CISA KEV] Ivanti Sentry - Ivanti Sentry OS Command Injection Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-10520
廠商: Ivanti
產品: Sentry
漏洞名稱: Ivanti Sentry OS Command Injection Vulnerability
說明: Ivanti Sentry (formerly known as MobileIron Sentry) contains an OS command injection vulnerability which could allow a remote unauthenticated user to achieve root-level remote code execution. This vulnerability can be successfully exploited in cases where the Sentry appliance is in an unmanaged state with its endpoints externally reachable. The use of mTLS with EPMM or restricted HTTPS access through Neurons for MDM makes interfaces inaccessible to external actors.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.
修補截止日: 2026-06-14
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 此情資指出 Ivanti Sentry 存在嚴重的作業系統指令注入漏洞（CVE-2026-10520），遠端未授權攻擊者可藉此取得 root 權限並執行任意程式碼。該漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知利用漏洞清單（KEV）。經比對，公司目前並未部署或使用該受影響之產品，故無直接安全風險。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Google Chromium V8 - Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Read and Write Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-11645
廠商: Google
產品: Chromium V8
漏洞名稱: Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Read and Write Vulnerability
說明: Google Chromium V8 out-of-bounds read and write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-23
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Google Chromium V8 引擎存在越界讀寫漏洞（CVE-2026-11645），已被列入 CISA KEV 在野利用清單。攻擊者可透過精心設計的 HTML 網頁，在沙箱內執行任意程式碼，影響 Google Chrome 及 Microsoft Edge 等主流瀏覽器。
analysis.recommendation: 1. 資訊部門（RR40）應立即透過 VMware Workspace ONE 派送更新，將所有員工「資訊設備-桌上型電腦/筆記型電腦」上的 Google Chrome、Microsoft Edge 等瀏覽器升級至最新安全版本。 2. 宣導同仁切勿點擊來源不明的網頁連結，以防範惡意網頁攻擊。
affected_assets: 資訊設備-桌上型電腦/筆記型電腦

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Arista Extensible Operating System - Arista Extensible Operating System Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-7473
廠商: Arista
產品: Extensible Operating System
漏洞名稱: Arista Extensible Operating System Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors Vulnerability
說明: Arista Extensible Operating System (EOS) contains an incomplete comparison with missing factors vulnerability when the switch incorrectly decapsulate and forwards other unexpected tunneled packet with a destination IP matching its configured decapsulation IP.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-23
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 此情資涉及 Arista Extensible Operating System (EOS) 的安全漏洞 (CVE-2026-7473)，該漏洞源於交換器在解封裝與轉發通道封包時存在比對不完整缺陷。攻擊者可利用此漏洞使交換器錯誤轉發非預期的通道封包，導致網路流量異常或潛在的安全邊界繞過。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager - Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-20245
廠商: Cisco
產品: Catalyst SD-WAN Manager
漏洞名稱: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
說明: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by supplying a crafted file to the affected system.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-23
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager 存在輸出編碼或轉義不當漏洞（CVE-2026-20245），已被列入 CISA KEV 漏洞名單。此漏洞允許已驗證的本地攻擊者透過上傳特製檔案，在受影響系統上以 root 權限執行任意指令。經評估，本公司並未部署或使用該受影響產品，因此無直接安全風險。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

說明: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a command injection vulnerability that could allow any authenticated user, including holders of low-privilege internal-user keys, to run arbitrary commands on the host.

reference_urls: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. intel.title: [CISA KEV] Check Point Security Gateway - Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability

CVE: CVE-2026-50751
廠商: Check Point
產品: Security Gateway
漏洞名稱: Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
說明: Check Point Security Gateway contains an improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange that could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to bypass user authentication and establish a remote access VPN connection without a valid user password.

analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] SolarWinds Serv-U - SolarWinds Serv-U Uncontrolled Resource Consumption Vulnerability

CVE: CVE-2026-28318

產品: Serv-U

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Mirasvit Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer - Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-45247
廠商: Mirasvit
產品: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer
漏洞名稱: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
說明: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by supplying a crafted serialized PHP object in the CacheWarmer cookie.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-06
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer 存在反序列化漏洞（CVE-2026-45247），遠端攻擊者可透過在 Cookie 中植入惡意的 PHP 序列化物件，在未經授權的情況下執行任意程式碼。此漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV），具有高度危害性。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Linux Kernel - Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2022-0492
廠商: Linux
產品: Kernel
漏洞名稱: Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
說明: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the cgroups v1 release_agent feature.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-05
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
reference_urls: This vulnerability affects a common open-source component, third-party library, or a protocol used by different products. Please check with specific vendors for information on patching status. For more information, please see: https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=24f6008564183aa120d07c03d9289519c2fe02af ; https://www.kernel.org/ ; https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-0492

analysis.summary: Linux Kernel 存在安全漏洞（CVE-2022-0492），攻擊者可利用 cgroups v1 release_agent 功能進行權限提升。此漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV，顯示已有在野利用。由於此漏洞發布已超過 3 年，且公司資產未明確指出使用受影響之舊版 Linux Ubuntu，故整體風險評估為 Low。
analysis.recommendation: 建議 RR40 部門確認公司內部「資訊軟體-伺服器軟體-Linux ubuntu」之核心（Kernel）版本。若仍在使用 2022 年以前未修補之舊版本，應立即更新 Linux 核心或套用作業系統安全補丁。若無法立即更新，可透過禁用 cgroups v1 或限制容器權限等緩解措施進行防護。
affected_assets: 資訊軟體-伺服器軟體-Linux ubuntu

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Android Framework - Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2025-48595
廠商: Android
產品: Framework
漏洞名稱: Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability
說明: Android Framework contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows for code execution that could allow for local privilege escalation.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-05
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: Android Framework 存在整數溢位漏洞（CVE-2025-48595），本地攻擊者可利用此漏洞提升權限並執行任意程式碼。該漏洞已被 CISA 列入已知遭利用漏洞清單（KEV），顯示已有活躍的攻擊活動。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。

intel.title: [CISA KEV] Oracle WebLogic Server - Oracle WebLogic Server Unspecified Vulnerability
intel.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2024-21182
廠商: Oracle
產品: WebLogic Server
漏洞名稱: Oracle WebLogic Server Unspecified Vulnerability
說明: Oracle WebLogic contains an unspecified vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker with network access via T3, IIOP to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server. Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle WebLogic Server accessible data.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-04
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown

analysis.summary: 此漏洞（CVE-2024-21182）存在於 Oracle WebLogic Server 中，允許未經授權的攻擊者透過 T3 或 IIOP 協定進行網路存取，進而危害伺服器並取得敏感資料。由於該漏洞已被收錄於 CISA KEV 且存在活躍攻擊，若企業使用該系統將面臨極高風險。
analysis.recommendation: 公司資產清冊未包含受影響資產，無需處置。
